description_long: This object consists of a row of seven blue traffic signs, each mounted on a vertical metallic post. The signs display a variety of symbols and pictograms, including a European Union flag, a yellow ribbon, a pedestrian crossing, a family, a bus, a camera, directional arrows, and a wheelchair accessibility symbol. The signs are rectangular and uniformly spaced, with each sign attached to its own post, all of which appear to be made of galvanized steel. The blue backgrounds and white pictograms are typical of informational or regulatory signs found in urban environments. The posts are slender and metallic, supporting the signs at a readable height for pedestrians and drivers. The overall structure is linear, with the signs forming a continuous row.
description: A row of seven blue informational traffic signs, each mounted on a metallic post and displaying various symbols and pictograms.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven blue signs with distinct symbols and pictograms clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the signs and posts, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the signs and posts, with no symbols or pictograms visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the signs and posts.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: European Union flag, yellow ribbon, pedestrian crossing, family, bus, camera, directional arrows, wheelchair symbol
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, parking lot entrance, or public facility walkway
